docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-06-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-06-2018 BY PAUL H. ALVARADO. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, GIGI CARLISLE, WITH WITNESS: BRIAN MCCOMAS. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT BRENDA CHANG. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PAUL ALVARADO, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARLISLE, GIGI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAN, BRENDA $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,500.00, NO COSTS ORDERED BY THE COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-18-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 (AT REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF) TRIAL OF MAY-21-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, BRENDA

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARLISLE, GIGI ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARLISLE, GIGI AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, BRENDA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-18-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUL-06-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF GIGI CARLISLE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRENDA CHAN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AT THE TIME OF ROLL CALL INDICATED A REQUEST TO CONTINUE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-06-2018 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-31-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, BRENDA
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CARLISLE, GIGI AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, BRENDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-21-2018 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
